MCQ; papers provided. MCQ with papers provided. No correct-labeled option contradicts the evidence; evidence C005 aligns with the stem’s comparative effectiveness and mechanism.

Short-answer item; one paper evidence bundle provided. The stem contains all needed quantitative thresholds and effects to determine the design-driving scenario and CO2 target (>35% for φ=0.5 jet). The mechanism prompt can be answered with general combustion/deflagration reasoning (CO2 thermal/kinetic inhibition affects flame speed and thus (dp/dt)max more than total energy/peak pressure) without requiring paper-only definitions. No gold-answer claim contradicts the evidence; evidence explicitly supports the stated thresholds and the differing jet vs premixed inhibition requirement.
